title: Add machine-readable output to swamp status command
description: CI pipelines that poll swamp status currently scrape the human-readable terminal output, which is fragile and breaks whenever the formatting changes. We need a way to get the status output in a structured format that scripts can reliably parse.

uatScenarios.summary: human-readable status output for active issues

kbEntries.summary: ADR for CLI output format conventions

dddContext.note: The status command belongs to the CLI application layer. It reads from the IssueLifecycle aggregate (read-only) and formats it. No domain model changes required. The JSON formatter is a new infrastructure/presentation component.
